data.name: customSqlQuery1.Sql
data.value:
select (case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'DEP' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type in ('25','55') then 'Saving Deposit' when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'DEP' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = '32' then 'Fixed Deposit' end ) as deposit_type
, replace(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name_eng( sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no ),' ' , ' ' ) as member_name_eng , sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno , 'XX-XXXXXXXXXX' ) as deposit_account_number , to_snumber(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance) as deposit_balance , to_snumber(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance/'!value_money!') as deposit_balance_currency
, (select to_snumber(sum(data_balance)) from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and data_group = 'SHR' ) as capital_stock
, (select to_snumber(sum(data_balance)/'!value_money!') from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and data_group = 'SHR' ) as capital_stock_currency
, (select to_snumber(sum(data_balance)) from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and data_group in ('SHR','DEP') and data_type not in ('27','30','38','42','44','46','90','91') ) as sum_data_balance
, (select to_snumber(sum(data_balance)/'!value_money!') from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and data_group in ('SHR','DEP') and data_type not in ('27','30','38','42','44','46','90','91') ) as sum_data_balance_currency
, sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , pka_com_function.fp_get_month_name( extract(month from sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date ) , 'LE' )||' '||extract(day from sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date )||', '||extract(year from sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date ) as confirm_edate , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type , pka_com_function.fp_get_month_name( extract(month from sysdate ) , 'LE' )||' '||extract(day from sysdate )||', '||extract(year from sysdate ) as book_edate , '!book_no!' as book_no , '!sponsor_name!' as sponsor_name
, pka_com_function.fp_get_month_name( extract(month from sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date ) , 'LE' )||' '||extract(day from sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date )||', '||extract(year from sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date ) as approve_edate , decode(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.sex,'M','He','She') as pronoun
, '!currency!' as currency , '!value_money!' as value_money
from sc_cls_confirm_data , sc_mem_m_membership_registered where 1=2 /*WHERE*/ --and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = '02075' --and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '09/06/2024' order by sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno
